name: SALUDING laundry basket
description: SALUDING Laundry basket - handmade bamboo 13 gallon. The lid's woven pattern is a tribute to traditional craftsmanship and makes it easy for you to drop laundry through the top. Skilled craftspeople have woven the basket by hand, so each basket is one of a kind. Holds up to 13 lbs of laundry.
